description_long: This is a modern precision sniper rifle featuring a long, heavy barrel with a prominent muzzle brake at the tip. The rifle is equipped with a large telescopic scope mounted on a Picatinny rail, enhancing its long-range targeting capabilities. The stock is skeletonized and adjustable, with a cheek rest and a robust buttpad for recoil absorption. The pistol grip is ergonomic, and a detachable box magazine is visible beneath the receiver. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a tactical and durable appearance. The finish is matte black, suitable for minimizing reflections in urban or tactical environments.
description: A modern, matte black precision sniper rifle with a long barrel, large scope, skeletonized adjustable stock, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the scope, skeletonized stock, pistol grip, and muzzle brake.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle brake and the alignment of the barrel and scope.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock, cheek rest, and the rear end of the scope.
